note:
Zero HOT setups? Zero WARM setups? **You gotta be kidding me.** The squeeze radar is a ghost town. No surprise, though—look around. The majors are stalling, the dollar’s stuck in no man's land, and bonds? Meh. This is the epitome of "neutral" right now. The market’s taking a breather, catching its breath after the recent chaos. Here's your cheat code: when the squeeze board goes quiet, we take the hint. It says loud and clear—momentum's in a holding pattern.

Zooming out, what’s the big picture? The chopfest continues. Risk assets can’t seem to pick a side, and sentiment is soggy. With zero names popping on the squeeze radar today, this market ain’t screaming "risk-on" OR "risk-off" right now. It’s one giant question mark. And when the market’s not giving you answers, the best move is to pause. The clean setups will come. They always do. Patience pays, folks.

Now let’s talk portfolio. We’re spread across some standout themes: uranium, crypto, and rare earths are still flexing. $UUUU and $MP—good luck convincing me this energy transition isn’t still alive and kicking. Both have printed monster moves, and we’ve already locked in 2x returns on half of each position. For those late to the party, these remain in strong primary uptrends and have plenty of room to run. Same deal in crypto. $COIN, $BLSH, $BMNR, and $ETHA have been absolute beasts. $COIN, in particular, is still strutting like it owns the block, up 140%. Call it what you want—froth, momentum, speculation—**that’s leadership.**

On the short side, semiconductors are the weak link. $INTC and $NVDA shorts are printing green for us. Chips had their time in the sun, but now they’re facing gravity. When the leaders roll over, the whole sector tends to follow. The market is telling us something here. Are we listening? This piece of the market still feels like dead weight. Stay out of the way or lean into it on the short side if you’re not already involved.

What’s next? We’re watching today’s close closely. A day like this is where patience matters most—think of it as standing on the shore, waiting for the tide to shift. Market rotation doesn’t happen overnight, but when it does, it’s fast. No new double-down alerts today, but those names riding secular stories—energy metals, crypto, and yes, even the space play $ASTS—remain actionable on pullbacks. There’s always something moving, even in a neutral regime.
